title: dupatya dendroides
side_effects: Dupatya dendroides can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and vomiting, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can also cause liver damage, kidney failure, and even respiratory problems in severe cases. Additionally, improper use of Dupatya dendroides may lead to allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and swelling, in some individuals. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid these side effects.
